name: Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc. (Bluejay) is a medical diagnostics company focused on improving patient outcomes in critical care settings, with a focus on sepsis. We are working on developing rapid, near-patient tests using whole blood on our Symphony technology platform (Symphony), which consists of an analyzer and single-use protein detection cartridges. We do not yet have regulatory clearance for Symphony, and we will need to receive regulatory authorization from the U.S. Food and ...
